title: The World Reacts Before the Reverie
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy, Shirahoshi as News of Whole Cake Island spreads across the world and the story pivots toward the Reverie.
scene: The world learns a distorted version of the Whole Cake Island incident as royal delegations move toward the Reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are you okay, young lad?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WHA... It moved?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I thought that was a building!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this a giant?! They eat humans! Their saliva can dissolve solid rock!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wait a second...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fangs 2

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is their skin such a strange color... are they half- fish fishmen?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They must be the fish type... the ones that infect you with rare diseases!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Gyaa Aaaah H4H!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Don't touch me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Bondola #2, your flight time has arrived.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well, then. Have fun.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Mr. Luffy's grandfather, thank you so much!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Our journey together was most enjoy- able!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So high!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: wow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hm? What's the matter, Shirahoshi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: father... it's the sun!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: brother! Look! The sun is shining so brightly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Heights of the skies are without limit!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the gleaming light of the sun sparkles all the way down to the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: YAAAH! It really is gorgeous! Mambo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that things above the waves were so pretty...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What a beautiful world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MM. The light of the sunlight tree on the seafood pales in comparison!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Father! If it were to come true... I would wish to live aboveground!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to show everyone of our kingdom this world of the sun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Let us wish, then.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is what the reverie is for, after all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Holy Land Mariejois

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Mister Sakazuki says...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I gotta find ya and kick ya out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: shall we go at it, then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Rahahaha! Fuhged- aboutit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I ain't tryna catch that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, we should try not to destroy this whole place if we can help it, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Fufu... yes. Truth be told...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to destroy something else entirely. A system.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you for the food. It was delicious.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've been on quite the journey, haven't you? How was old man vegapunk?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes. I didn't actually see him, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh? Which means...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The ouka shichi- Bukai

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: are no longer needed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Rahahaha! You're a madman! Foreals!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehe... well, none of that is particularly important now. This food, though, really is something. You should have some.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Or are you still on your fast?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: RAHAHA! If my sister were here to feed me,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Then I'd gladly eat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Marine HD Admiral RYOKUGYU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it's so annoying otherwise that it's been three years

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Since I've eaten anything!

summary: This section advances the Reverie Setup storyline with 52 dialogue beats. The aftermath becomes world news and the narrative shifts toward the Reverie and global politics.
